free_text: Polarization and differential cross-section for elastic
scattering of 40-MeV protons from C-12, Ca-40, Ni-58,
Zr-90 and Pb-208 and experimental method was described.
externally by elastic scattering from calcium.
All absolute cross sections were corrected by a
factor of 1.023 to account for the loss of counts due
to reactions undergone by the scattered protons in
the NaI crystal. This factor was deduced from the
The total absolute error in the normalization
includes partial uncertainties presented in Subents.
The absolute error in the normalization of the
asymmetry is taken to be that due to the uncertainty
INC-SPECT included. Updated to lower case.
